Author: carlfk
Content: @Tim 'mithro' Ansell im still stuck on how to get little_term.py on or close to the rp2040

Author: carlfk
Content: your ssh client -network- Pi -usb serial- RP2040 -uart serial- TT06 / 910 (KianV Linux)

Author: carlfk
Content: little_term.py runs on RP2040 to connect  Pi -usb serial- to -uart serial- TT06

Author: carlfk
Content: `mpremote fs cp little_term.py :` is the final step to install it, but none of the steps are automated.
